name: Jade
comment: Jade is a hybrid moving light delivering a full toolkit for designers in a single, compact fixture. Harnessing the power of the 280W discharge source with a custom optical system, it provides a punchy beam, even wash and crisp spot - all from a single unit.

gwSpecs.description: Jade is a hybrid moving light delivering a full toolkit for designers in a single, compact fixture. Harnessing the power of the 280W discharge source with a custom optical system, it provides a punchy beam, even wash and crisp spot - all from a single unit.
